mano_cua.result_summary: 自动链接对多段域名邮箱处理异常。输入test@telstra.com.au时，.com被识别为autolink后，后续输入的.au字符丢失/被吞噬，最终文本只显示test@telstra.com.而非完整的test@telstra.com.au。此外，当光标在autolink文本内部时，退格键(BackSpace)完全无效——连续按4次BackSpace后链接文本test@telstra.com.无任何变化，无法删除字符
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Two confirmed bugs: 1) When typing test@telstra.com.au, the autolink plugin consumes/drops the 'au' characters after '.com.' is recognized as a link domain. Final text shows only 'test@telstra.com.' instead of 'test@telstra.com.au'. 2) BackSpace key does not delete characters when cursor is positioned inside an autolink — 4 consecutive backspaces had zero visible effect on the link text 'test@telstra.com.'.
